pokemon:conkeldurr.name: Conkeldurr
pokemon:conkeldurr.summary: Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.
It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.
Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.
It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.
When going all out, this Pokémon throws aside its concrete pillars and leaps at opponents to pummel them with its fists.
Concrete mixed by Conkeldurr is much more durable than normal concrete, even when the compositions of the two materials are the same.
They use concrete pillars as walking canes. They know moves that enable them to swing the pillars freely in battle.
Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.
It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.
Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.

pokemon:timburr.name: Timburr
pokemon:timburr.summary: Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.
It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.
Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.
Timburr that have started carrying logs that are about three times their size are nearly ready to evolve.
It loves helping out with construction projects. It loves it so much that if rain causes work to halt, it swings its log around and throws a tantrum.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.
Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.
Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.

loreSummary: Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.

pokemon:gurdurr.name: Gurdurr
pokemon:gurdurr.summary: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
With strengthened bodies, they skillfully wield steel beams to take down buildings.
With strengthened bodies, they skillfully wield steel beams to take down buildings.
Gurdurr excels at demolition—construction is not its forte. In any case, there’s skill in the way this Pokémon wields its metal beam.
It shows off its muscles to Machoke and other Gurdurr. If it fails to measure up to the other Pokémon, it lies low for a little while.
They strengthen their bodies by carrying steel beams. They show off their big muscles to their friends.
With strengthened bodies, they skillfully wield steel beams to take down buildings.
With strengthened bodies, they skillfully wield steel beams to take down buildings.
This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
